title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*2026*
Develop your character, fulfill quests, and shape history in 15th-century Bohemia.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_6f03526e.png)

2. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_03ede012.jpg)

3. **Defenders of Hogwarts**
*2026*
Will you defend Hogwarts? Or choose to join the Dark Forces?
![Defenders of Hogwarts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_298e7ccf.jpg)

4. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*None*
The land of milk and honey is filling up with blood - make sure it's not yours.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_44bd4a70.jpg)

5. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_5f5a388e.jpg)

6. **Politik**
*2026*
Nations compete for military, political and corporate control of a fallen world.
![Politik](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_dd6a0f08.jpg)

7. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_ddae7923.jpg)

8. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_e2e044bb.jpg)

9. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_bdc0be81.jpg)

10. **Quickdraw: Battle for Silver City**
*2026*
The Law is caught in a tense shootout with Bandits in this asymmetric squad builder.
![Quickdraw: Battle for Silver City](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_ab5006e0.png)

11. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_fe1e4c99.jpg)

12. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_2ba2f7e6.jpg)

13. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_22a72f19.png)

14. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_5a31a488.jpg)

15. **Duel of Meloch**
*2026*
Scythe vs Expeditions: Clash head-to-head on a tight map in a race to victory.
![Duel of Meloch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_0207cabd.png)

16. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_71e6a4ee.png)

17. **Diables**
*2026*
A strategic eurogame of fire, timing, and crowd mastery.
![Diables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_60bd1e75.jpg)

18. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_9c86c2bc.jpg)

19. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_93d440d8.jpg)

20. **The Quest for El Dorado**
*2017*
Race through a dense South American jungle in pursuit of the legendary city of gold.
![The Quest for El Dorado](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_bfc6b0ab.jpg)

21. **Sankoré: The Pride of Mansa Musa**
*2024*
Compete to manage the best school of a university in 14th-century Timbuktu.
![Sankoré: The Pride of Mansa Musa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_2c976000.jpg)

22. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_8b5dbe4b.jpg)

23. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_edeb33b9.jpg)

24. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_dab81170.jpg)

25. **Wingspan**
*2019*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_9cc57d45.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_d57e4909.jpg)

*54 months on the list*

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*

7. **Bomb Busters**
*14 months on the list*

8. **Terraforming Mars**

*43 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_cecfd9e3.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*

![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_a417c9f3.jpg)

13. **Cascadia**
*59 months on the list*

![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-06/toplist/bgg_5ba69e53.jpg)
